content: Set up Python WebSocket server for Kali Linux (using FastAPI and pty)
Implement basic authentication for the WebSocket server
Initialize React Native (Expo) project for the mobile app
Implement Terminal UI in React Native (using WebView + xterm.js for robust ANSI support)
Connect mobile app to Kali server via WebSockets
Update Kali Server to connect OUT to Railway Relay
Update Mobile App to connect to Railway Relay
